name: anvil finish-gate
description: anvil's OpenClaw integration: blocks finalizing while a claimed task lacks evidence (before_agent_finalize), auto-captures verification-command output to the claim's evidence buffer (after_tool_call), injects anvil usage guidance into the system prompt for tracked projects (before_prompt_build), and guards mutating tools against editing without an active claim (before_tool_call).

claimGuardMode.description: before_tool_call claim-guard behavior when a mutating tool runs with no active claim. warn (default): log only, never blocks. block: hard-veto the tool (CI/strict). require_approval: route to approval — DO NOT use in a headless gateway (no approver = hard block). off: disable.

guardExec.description: Also flag exec/bash tools run without a claim (default off). WARN-ONLY even in block mode — there is no command parser, and hard-blocking arbitrary commands would also block `anvil claim` (a deadlock).

maxBlast.description: Risk ceiling for this runner: only offer tasks whose blast_radius is CONFIRMED and <= this (1=isolated .. 5=foundational). Exported to `anvil next` as $ANVIL_MAX_BLAST. Omit for no blast ceiling. Safe-by-construction — unconfirmed/unscored/over-ceiling tasks are withheld, so a low-capability runner is never handed high-blast work.

maxReviewRisk.description: Risk ceiling: only offer tasks whose review_risk is CONFIRMED and <= this (same safe-by-construction semantics as maxBlast). Exported as $ANVIL_MAX_REVIEW_RISK. Omit for no review-risk ceiling.

activePrd.description: Scope task discovery to a single PRD partition (multi-PRD). Exported as $ANVIL_PRD so `anvil next` / `anvil list` only surface this PRD's tasks. Omit to span all PRDs.

guidanceLevel.description: System-prompt guidance verbosity injected via before_prompt_build. 'standard' (default): the concise anvil usage nudge. 'verbose': a more explicit, step-by-step, guardrailed instruction variant (shipped as AGENTS-weak.md) for agents weaker than frontier models — walks them through the claim -> read -> work -> verify -> submit loop so they complete it reliably. Also settable via $ANVIL_GUIDANCE_LEVEL (env wins).
